message: I was charged $45 for a data add-on I never purchased. This appeared on my latest bill and I want it removed immediately. My account number is NV-20458.
My phone has been showing No Service for the past 3 hours. I've already tried restarting it. I need this fixed ASAP, I'm expecting important calls.
I want to cancel my NovaTel service. I've been a customer for 4 years but your prices keep going up and I found a better deal with another carrier.
Hi, I'm thinking about upgrading from the Essential plan to the Premium plan. Can you tell me what extra features I'd get and if there are any fees for switching?
What are your current prepaid plan options? I'm considering switching from postpaid to prepaid to save money.

This is the THIRD time I'm calling about the same billing error. Every month I get charged for a service I cancelled two months ago. Your support team keeps saying it's fixed but it never is. I'm done with this company.
I can't send picture messages to my friends. Regular texts work fine but MMS keeps failing. I have the Essential plan.
I'm travelling to Mexico next week. What roaming options do you have and how do I activate them before I leave?
I need to dispute a charge on my bill. There's a $35 reconnection fee but I was never disconnected. My service has been active the entire time.
My mobile hotspot stopped working yesterday. I have the Premium plan which should include 15 GB hotspot. I've only used about 3 GB this month.
I want to add my daughter to my plan as a second line. She's 16 and I want to make sure there are parental controls available. What are my options?
Cancel my account right now. I don't want to hear about any deals or retention offers. Just cancel it effective immediately.
I just bought a new Samsung Galaxy S25 and I need help setting it up with my NovaTel SIM card. The phone isn't detecting the network.
Why was I charged $12 for a roaming day pass? I was in Canada the entire day and never left the country. This charge is fraudulent.
I've been on hold for 45 minutes. This is absolutely unacceptable customer service. I pay $95 a month for the Ultimate plan which supposedly includes priority support. This is a joke.
How do I set up visual voicemail on my iPhone? I just switched to NovaTel from another carrier.
I want to switch from my current Premium plan to the Starter plan. I know it's a downgrade but I'm trying to reduce my monthly expenses.
My internet speed has been terrible for the past week. I'm on the Ultimate plan and paying for unlimited high-speed but I'm getting less than 1 Mbps. I've run multiple speed tests.
I noticed someone changed my account PIN without my authorization. I'm very concerned about the security of my account. Please help immediately.
Do you have any student discounts available? I just enrolled at the University of Toronto and I'm looking to save on my phone bill.

I've had three billing errors in the last four months, my service drops calls constantly, and when I call support nobody can fix anything. I'm filing a complaint with the CCTS if this isn't resolved today.
Can I keep my current phone number if I switch to NovaTel from Bell? How long does the process take?
